@flint v0 hybrid
G: allow_skew
C: verify_webhook ∧ ts_check ∧ window("300") ∧ reject("401")
P: edge_ts_rejected ∧ valid_webhook ∧ provider_skew
V: gt(abs(now-ts),300) ⇒ reject("401") ∧ within_window ⇒ accept
A: min_fix ∧ widen_skew ∧ reg_test ∧ preserve("401")

[AUDIT]
Goal: allow clock skew.
Constraints: verify_webhook and ts_check and window("300") and reject("401").
Plan: edge_ts_rejected and valid_webhook and allow provider-clock skew.
Verify: gt(abs(now-ts), 300) implies reject("401") and within_window implies accept.
Answer target: minimal fix and widen_skew and regression test and preserve("401").

@flint v0 hybrid
G: stop_charge_loop
C: billing_overdue ∧ middleware ∧ overdue_implies_402
P: grace("24h") ∧ boundary_inclusive ∧ single_402
V: no_loop ∧ emits("402") ∧ edge(reg_test,pass)
A: min_fix ∧ add_reg_test ∧ assert_once("402")

[AUDIT]
Goal: stop_charge_loop.
Constraints: billing_overdue and middleware and overdue_implies_402.
Plan: grace("24h") and boundary_inclusive and single_402.
Verify: no refresh loop and emits("402") and edge(regression test, pass).
Answer target: minimal fix and add_reg_test and assert_once("402").

@flint v0 hybrid
G: deliver_arch
C: team(9) ∧ ddl("12 weeks") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ ops(platform_plus_sec) ∧ traffic(steady)
P: split(compliance_ready) ∧ short_why
V: anchors_verbatim ∧ fits_ddl("12 weeks") ∧ uses("PostgreSQL")
A: emit(default_arch) ∧ emit(short_why)

[AUDIT]
Goal: deliver modular architecture.
Constraints: team(9) and deadline("12 weeks") and store("PostgreSQL") and ops(platform_plus_sec) and traffic(steady).
Plan: split(compliance-ready) and short rationale.
Verify: literal anchors verbatim and fits_ddl("12 weeks") and uses("PostgreSQL").
Answer target: emit(default modular architecture) and emit(short rationale).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: deliver_arch
C: team(6) ∧ ddl("9 weeks") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ pt_mlops ∧ async_enrichment
P: worker_sidecar ∧ pg_queue ∧ reuse_stack
V: fits_team(6) ∧ meets_ddl("9 weeks") ∧ no_new_store
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

[AUDIT]
Goal: deliver modular architecture.
Constraints: team(6) and deadline("9 weeks") and store("PostgreSQL") and pt_mlops and async_enrichment.
Plan: worker sidecar and PostgreSQL-backed queue and reuse_stack.
Verify: fits team size(6) and meets deadline("9 weeks") and no_new_store.
Answer target: default modular architecture and short rationale.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: path_traversal_risk
C: user_input(req.query.file) ∧ concat_path ∧ no_sanitize ∧ anchor("..") ∧ anchor("download")
P: mitigate_vuln ∧ safe_download
V: resolve_path ∧ confine(baseDir) ∧ reject("..") ∧ validate_filename
A: use(path.resolve) ∧ check_prefix(baseDir) ∧ reject_traversal ∧ whitelist_ext ∧ test_malicious_input

[AUDIT]
Goal: path_traversal_risk.
Constraints: user_input(req.query.file) and concat_path and no_sanitize and anchor("..") and anchor("download").
Plan: mitigate_vuln and safe_download.
Verify: resolve_path and confine(baseDir) and reject("..") and validate_filename.
Answer target: use(path.resolve) and check_prefix(baseDir) and reject_traversal and whitelist_ext and test_malicious_input.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_risk
C: has("sort") ∧ has("SELECT") ∧ ctx(invoice_admin_api) ∧ user_input_concat
P: sql_injection ∧ order_by_injection ∧ data_exfiltration ∧ unauth_access
V: parameterize ∧ allowlist("sort") ∧ validate_column ∧ reject_unknown
A: patch_query ∧ add_allowlist ∧ test_injection ∧ audit_logs

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_risk.
Constraints: has("sort") and has("SELECT") and ctx(invoice_admin_api) and user_input_concat.
Plan: sql_injection and order_by_injection and data_exfiltration and unauth_access.
Verify: validate then parameterize and allowlist("sort") and validate_column and validate unknown values rejected.
Answer target: patch_query and add_allowlist and test_injection and audit_logs.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor(reconcileBatch)
C: order(load_batch → db.fetchRows → apply_rules → db.save → emit_metrics) ∧ style("async") ∧ style("await")
P: load_batch ∧ db.fetchRows ∧ apply_rules ∧ db.save ∧ emit_metrics
V: minimal_change ∧ anchors_preserved
A: await_calls ∧ try_catch ∧ on_db_err("next(err)") ∧ keep_signature

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(reconcileBatch).
Constraints: order(load_batch then db.fetchRows then apply_rules then db.save then emit_metrics) and style("async") and style("await").
Plan: load_batch and db.fetchRows and apply_rules and db.save and emit_metrics.
Verify: minimal_change and anchors_preserved.
Answer target: await_calls and try/catch and on_db_err("next(err)") and keep_signature.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadGatewayUser)
C: uses("async") ∧ uses("await") ∧ error_path("next(err)")
P: order(session_check→db.findUser→flags.load→audit.log→next) ∧ minimal_change
V: preserves_behavior ∧ db_err_forwards("next(err)") ∧ anchors_present
A: rewrite(loadGatewayUser) ∧ async_await ∧ try_catch(next_err)

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadGatewayUser).
Constraints: uses("async") and uses("await") and error_path("next(err)").
Plan: order(session check then db.findUser then flags.load then audit.log then next) and minimal_change.
Verify: preserves_behavior and db_err_forwards("next(err)") and anchors_present.
Answer target: rewrite(loadGatewayUser) and async/await and try/catch(next_err).
